finding: bind_tools() does NOT recognize tool_search_bm25_2025_04_15 as a builtin tool type (KeyError on 'parameters'). Use llm.bind(tools=...) instead to bypass conversion. convert_to_anthropic_tool() preserves defer_loading on tool dicts.
workaround: Use llm.bind(tools=formatted_tools) instead of bind_tools() for the tool search path. Format tools with convert_to_anthropic_tool() + defer_loading flag, pass tool_search dict as-is.
server_tool_use_in_tool_calls: unknown - requires live API call to determine
